## Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / chore
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🚀 Release / packaging

## Check-list

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passe
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passe
- [ ] `pnpm build` passe
- [ ] Smoke pertinent lancé (`pnpm smoke`, `pnpm smoke:agent`, etc.)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md mis à jour si user-facing
- [ ] Documentation mise à jour si comportement public change
